2023-24 North Texas Mean Green Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 19-15 (10-8, 7th in AAC MBB)

Coach: Ross Hodge

PS/G: 69.2 (293rd of 362)

PA/G: 63.8 (12th of 362)

SRS: 8.41 (79th of 362)

SOS: 4.28 (93rd of 362)

ORtg: 108.7 (131st of 362)

DRtg: 100.2 (87th of 362)
